_about: Bewiched EOS Scorecard data. Written by run_weekly.py pull_eos_scorecard(); rendered by gen_eos_scorecard.py. Live = BigQuery; derived = other feeds; manual = inputs sheet.

weekly.name: YoY Sales Growth
weekly.note: Last completed week vs same week last year (LFL). Weekly counterpart of the quarterly YoY; reuses the weekly sales pull (lw26/lw25).

weekly.name: YoY Transactional Growth
weekly.note: Last completed week transactions vs same week last year (LFL); reuses tx26/tx25.

weekly.name: F1 Score
weekly.detail: Last week's race result, estate avg (21 stores)
weekly.note: PROVISIONAL PLAN (280) — F1 race 'Total Score' scale (estate avg ~282), NOT the /5 or stated 75 scale. Confirm the target on this scale, or switch to championship position / a /100 normalised score.

weekly.name: Brand Audit Score
weekly.detail: No brand audits logged last week
weekly.note: Last completed week's audits. Brand audits are periodic — tile stays awaiting in weeks with none; the quarterly QTD tile is the reliable one.

weekly.name: Food GP%
weekly.note: PROXY: company food-specific GP% not yet sourced — using the weekly CoS estate GP%. The CoS sheet posts a week in arrears.

weekly.name: Google Health
weekly.note: Blend: avg of reviews÷40 and rating÷4.6, each capped 100%. Green at 100%.

weekly.name: Rate My Shift Health
weekly.detail: No Rate My Shift submissions logged last week
weekly.note: Blend: avg of submissions÷70 and avgScore÷4.6, each capped 100%.

weekly.name: Brew Crew Kudos Participation
weekly.note: Manual weekly input — % of team giving kudos. Enter in the EOS Scorecard Inputs sheet.

weekly.name: Social Media Engagement
weekly.note: Metric and target not yet defined.

weekly.name: SPH Labour (incl holiday pay)
weekly.detail: £168257 sales ÷ 2916 hours used (last week, 17 stores reporting)
weekly.note: Sales per labour hour incl holiday pay. Provisional on Sunday; finalised Monday once planner hours post.

weekly.name: Bench
weekly.detail: 5 managers ready on the bench (HRP bench sheet)
weekly.note: Count of named Bench Managers in the HRP bench sheet. Green when ≥ 3. Override via the inputs sheet.

quarterly.name: YoY Sales Growth
quarterly.detail: LFL QTD sales vs same period last year (19 like-for-like stores)

quarterly.name: YoY Transactional Growth
quarterly.detail: LFL QTD transactions vs last year (19 like-for-like stores)

quarterly.name: Brand Audit Score
quarterly.detail: Estate average brand audit (QTD), out of 5
quarterly.note: Auto-derived from the Brand Audit sheet; override in the inputs sheet if needed.

quarterly.name: F1 Score
quarterly.detail: QTD race 'Total Score', estate avg (21 stores)
quarterly.note: PROVISIONAL PLAN (280) — F1 race 'Total Score' scale (estate avg ~282), NOT the /5 or stated 75 scale. Confirm the target on this scale, or switch to championship position / a /100 normalised score.

quarterly.name: Net Profit After Tax (projected)
quarterly.note: Projected NPAT % of turnover — not in POS data. Enter from management accounts in the inputs sheet.

quarterly.name: Food GP%
quarterly.detail: Estate GP% from Cost of Sales (commercial stores)
quarterly.note: PROXY: company food-specific GP% not yet sourced — using CoS estate GP%. Override in the inputs sheet.

quarterly.name: New Starter Health
quarterly.note: Metric and target not yet defined.

flags: Status is strictly binary: GREEN when actual ≥ plan, RED when below — no near-target band. Bench is green when ≥ 3.
Google Health & Rate My Shift Health blend divisors (40 reviews / 4.6★ ; 70 submissions / 4.6★) are default assumptions — adjust if you prefer different volume targets.
Plans (Matt's stated defaults): SPH Labour 50, Brew Crew Kudos 50%%, Bench 3, NPAT 18%%, Food GP%% 71%%. YoY Sales 12%% / Transactions 5%% on both tabs.

F1 Score is now LIVE from the F1 sheet (Matt Fountain's F1 workbook, ID 1YFqpR9_ftlQEbfwc5ZVMjtS5tFO0j-7ccwB8rwG56wQ) — weekly = last week's race Total Score, quarterly = QTD avg. SCALE TO CONFIRM: values are the raw race 'Total Score' (~282), so the plan is a PROVISIONAL 280 on that scale, NOT the stated 75. Tell me the real target on the Total-Score scale, or whether F1 should be championship position / a /100 normalised score.

Weekly tab now mirrors the quarterly measures wherever a genuine weekly value exists: YoY Sales, YoY Transactions, F1 Score (last week's race), Food GP%% (weekly CoS, posted a week in arrears), and Brand Audit (last week's audits — periodic, so it shows 'awaiting' in weeks with none; latest audit on file is currently 18 Jun).
Net Profit After Tax and New Starter Health are intentionally QUARTERLY-ONLY — no weekly tile (NPAT is monthly/quarterly management-accounts data; New Starter Health is a quarterly measure).
Net Profit After Tax % is not available from POS/BigQuery — manual entry from management accounts.
Food GP% uses the Cost of Sales estate GP% as a proxy until a company food-specific GP source exists.
Social Media Engagement and New Starter Health are greyed TBC placeholders pending metric + target definitions.

Manual inputs sheet 'Bewiched EOS Scorecard Inputs' (ID 1HimYAjZg4zlMQG91-KUefkeYMPvrU4ddVuO2IuERTqg) must be shared (Viewer) with dashboards-bot@bewiched-coffee-368116.iam.gserviceaccount.com for the automated run to read it.
